'''MSE-1T''' is one of a pair of a [[Unidentified MSE droid series|certain type]] of [[MSE-series]] droid that lived in [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]]' [[Tomorrowland Starport]].<ref name="ST" /> Both droids rode around a track and were said to consume spare metal parts. The second droid was in disrepair at one point.<ref name="CGST">''[[Complete Guide to Star Tours]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
In [[2005]], [[Hasbro]] released MSE-1T as an exclusive [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']] action figure.<ref name="Hasbro">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: Star Tours (toy line)|pack=MSE-1T|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/sw05mse1t.asp}}</ref> The droid and its counterpart found in the [[Disney's Hollywood Studios]] and [[Tokyo Disneyland]] version of ''Star Tours''.<ref name="ST" />

According to the Spot the Droid poster and the ''[[Complete Guide to Star Tours]]'' booklet for the Tokyo starport, they made their homes in the [[Droidnostics Center]]. A map of the ride noted that passengers are often extremely lucky to find one.<ref name="CGST" />
